steps.title: Mobile Card Layout
evidence: Desktop: SessionSidebar visible with session list, Sessions + Settings nav items
Mobile (400x800): Full-width session cards, no sidebar column
Cards show: status dot, title/ID, time-ago (13h ago, 1d ago)
Date group header visible: THIS WEEK
Master-detail: tapped card navigates to /session/:id with Sessions back button

steps.title: Active Strip
evidence: 4 active strip pills visible at top of mobile card list (Switch to session: buttons)
Pills show project initials (ba = baseplane)
Tapping pill navigates to session detail view (/session/4aae01b403ca...)
Session showed waiting_input status confirming qualifying session logic

steps.title: Card Gestures
evidence: 12 elements with data-session-card attribute found in DOM
touch-action: pan-y confirmed on card elements (correct for horizontal gesture)
Code inspection: useDrag from @use-gesture/react with axis:'x', filterTaps, rubberband:0.15
useSpring from @react-spring/web with tension:250, friction:26
Swipe-left reveals archive action (ArchiveIcon + Archive/Restore text)
No swipe-right: movement clamped with Math.min(mx, 0)
Velocity flick detection: vx > 0.5 && dx < 0
SWIPE_THRESHOLD = 80px

steps.title: Navigation Cleanup
evidence: Sidebar nav items: Sessions, Settings only (no Dashboard, no History)
No workspace selector dropdown in sidebar header
/history returns Not Found page
Filter chip bar visible: Workspace, All, This Week chips

steps.title: Unit Tests + Typecheck
evidence: vitest run: 31 test files, 358 tests — all passed
Test files present: __tests__/active-strip-utils.test.ts, __tests__/filter-utils.test.ts, __tests__/session-card-filters.test.ts, session-utils.test.tsx, SessionCardList.test.tsx
pnpm typecheck: 6/6 tasks successful, 0 type errors
